creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Bugfix release, merge to quarterly branch.

^Triage: Please confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least).
--
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing.html

Some variables are out of place:

# Maintainer block
MAINTAINER
COMMENT

# License block
LICENSE
LICENSE_FILE

# BROKEN/IGNORE/DEPRECATED messages
BROKEN_i386

# USES block
USES
USE_GITHUB
+USE_RC_SUBR

-CONFLICTS_INSTALL

# USES=shebangfix related variables
SHEBANG_FILES

# Conflicts
+CONFLICTS_INSTALL
-USE_RC_SUBR



Thanks!
